title: Malaysian-Style Crispy Frittata
description: A twist on the classic frittata, this Malaysian-inspired dish combines crispy shallots with a rich egg mixture.
instructions: Sauté crispy shallots in a pan until fragrant.
Add pre-cooked frittata and break it up with a spatula.
Whisk eggs and season with Malaysian chili flakes, salt, and black pepper.
Pour egg mixture over frittata mixture in the pan.
Transfer the pan to the oven and bake for 12-15 minutes.
Remove from oven and let cool before slicing and serving.
Serve warm, garnished with additional crispy shallots if desired.
